meta.title: Nomavek Blog
meta.description: AI architecture notes for design studios tracking tools, decisions, visualization, and practice workflows

published.title: Can AI Understand A Project, Not Just A Prompt?
published.excerpt: AI image tools can generate fast options, but they do not remember your project logic. Small studios need project memory, decision logs, and boards.
published.ai-summary: Explains the difference between image-generation tools and project-aware agent workflows, then gives a simple studio-ready method for keeping project context stable.

published.title: Can Architects Use AI Images in Client Presentations?
published.excerpt: Yes, but the image should be framed as a concept option, not as a finished design promise. Here is a simple presentation workflow for small studios.
published.ai-summary: Practical guide for small architecture studios using AI images in client presentations, focusing on concept labels, source trails, fewer options, and decision boards.

published.title: How to Make a Winning Architectural Competition Entry in 20 Minutes (Using Only Your Phone)
published.excerpt: A battle-tested framework for creating competition-worthy architectural submissions in under 20 minutes using only a smartphone and AI image generators.
published.ai-summary: Step-by-step guide for architects to create competition entries quickly using mobile AI tools, covering concept generation, image creation, and presentation layout.

published.title: How to Use AI for Bionic Architecture: From Nature to Built Form
published.excerpt: A complete workflow for transforming natural forms into architectural concepts using AI image generation. From succulent rosette to urban public building.
published.ai-summary: Step-by-step guide on using AI tools to generate bionic architecture concept boards, covering inspiration analysis, parametric evolution, and material detailing.

published.title: AI Rendering Tools for Architects in 2026: Complete Comparison
published.excerpt: Compare Nano Banana Pro, D5 Render, Midjourney v7, and Stable Diffusion for architectural visualization.
published.ai-summary: A detailed comparison of 4 AI rendering tools for architects, covering speed, cost, quality, and workflow integration.

published.title: 15 Urban Waterfront Site Transformation Prompts for Studio Nomad
published.excerpt: Transform any city center waterfront site with these 15 ready-to-use Studio Nomad prompt templates.
published.ai-summary: 15 prompt templates for urban waterfront site transformation using Studio Nomad's S11+S12 framework.

published.title: S11 + S12 Prompt Framework: How We Structure Architectural AI Prompts
published.excerpt: The S11+S12 framework separates Subject from Style for consistent architectural AI outputs.
published.ai-summary: Explains the S11+S12 prompt framework used in Studio Nomad for architectural AI generation.
